lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If I go near that camel, it'll probably bite my hand off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder if that camel has fleas...

lines.speaker: Ugthanki
lines.text: Come over here, I'll bite your leg off!

lines.speaker: Ugthanki
lines.text: Prepare to die, you two-legged combat wrangler!

lines.speaker: Ugthanki
lines.text: Your mother was a jackal, and your father smelt of cactuses!
